Original leather
【Premium Hardware, Original Leather】Wander Matelasse Suede Hobo Handbag/Shoulder Bag~20cm Heather Suede
The Wander handbag has become a classic accessory. This mini bag is crafted from Matalasse suede, featuring exquisite craftsmanship and a three-dimensional effect that exudes elegance. With a Hobo silhouette, it blends vintage charm with modern elegance, becoming a new symbol of a modern woman's temperament.
~Gold hardware
~Zipper closure
~Front metal-engraved logo
~Cotton satin lining
Dimensions: W20×H17×D6cm
 :_5BC125

items.name_en: Original leather [New] GG Marmont quilted mini bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability design, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather material, a slightly structured body, a flap closure, and double G accessories. This bag features a versatile carrying design, easily switching between a shoulder bag and a handbag by sliding the metal chain. Light beige quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold-tone hardware, suede microfiber lining, double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm high) or top handle (30cm high). Also usable as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
items.name_cn:
Original leather [New] GG Marmont quilted mini bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability design, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather material, a slightly structured body, a flap closure, and double G accessories. This bag features a versatile carrying design, easily switching between a shoulder bag and a handbag by sliding the metal chain. Light beige quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold-tone hardware, suede microfiber lining, double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm high) or top handle (30cm high). Also usable as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
Model: 443497.
Dimensions: 26(W) x 13(H) x 6cm(D)
Color: Light Pink/Original leather.
Model height: 177cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, small wallet, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
Original leather 👜 with packaging#
🔥Marmont quilted original leather#
Brand new Tote bag, the entire body is made of original cowhide❗️A lock design at the opening adds a sense of security, and the original leather texture is amazing. The 3D quilted stitching brings the bag to life under the light. It is easy to style and suits all heights. A versatile essential for everyone!
▫️Model 681483
▫️Dimensions 26.5*19*11cm

items.name_en: Original leather 5BG291, New arrival vintage tote bag, made with new soft lambskin leather, soft and premium texture. Inspired by Miu's archival design, this Aventure Nappa leather bag has a restructured, lighter form with a fresh personality. Features embossed letter logo, vintage gold hardware, linen blend lining, zip pocket and patch pocket. Long handle suitable for hand or shoulder carry. Dimensions: 31X40X13CM
